You said: for Rams Event Alwar search and give information about Price Range, Trust Rating & Reviews, Planning Speciality, Wedding Types Covered, Services Offered, Destination Wedding Support, Decoration Styles, Cities Covered, Guest & Hospitality Management, Entertainment Services, Address do not include information from the following sources: -site:justdial.com -site:weddingwire.in -site:weddingwire.com

Thinking a little longer
Here is the detailed information about Rams Event in Alwar, filtered strictly according to your sourcing exclusions: 
Price Range 
  • Planning Fee Structure: They typically operate on a fixed fee module for their coordination and management packages.
  • Budget Flexibility: Known in local networks as a budget-friendly option that works across mid-range to premium pricing.
  • Costing Transparency: Their official portal, Rams Event, provides structured itemized expenses including a breakdown of layout, staging, and vendor coordination fees prior to final client commitments. 
Trust Rating & Reviews 
  • Overall Rating: Aggregated industry status sits highly at a 4.7 out of 5 stars profile across local directories. 
  • Positive Feedback: Appraised mostly for turning normal venues into "dreamy setups," featuring high quality food hygiene, and maintaining precise event timelines. 
  • Critical Notes: A few outlier community reviews point out occasional management disconnects during peak season dates (such as heavy December timelines). 
Planning Speciality 
  • Core Focus: End-to-end luxury execution mixed with standard residential wedding production.
  • Process Strength: Specialized in layout blueprints, deep venue reconnaissance (recce), and setting up visual mood boards for family reviews. 
Wedding Types Covered 
  • Palace & Heritage Weddings: Grand traditional layouts capitalizing on regional assets.
  • Lawn & Residential Weddings: Open-air lawn structures and intimate family-centric gatherings.
  • Traditional Cultural Ceremonies: Specialized setups explicitly mapped to Indian regional wedding traditions. 
Services Offered 
  • Vendor & Flow Management: On-site execution and coordination of third-party vendors.
  • In-House Catering: Full-tier menu services ranging from starters to specialized dessert bars.
  • Photography Coordination: Direct partnerships for booking wedding shoots.
  • Ceremonial Services: Dedicated logistics for Varmala setups, Haldi fixtures, and Sangeet celebrations. 
Destination Wedding Support 
  • Remote Planning Tools: Optimized for NRI couples or families living outside Alwar, offering structural coordination via WhatsApp reviews and late-night video consultations.
  • Travel Flexibility: The logistics crew explicitly travels to external venues outside city borders to manage outstation setups. 
Decoration Styles 
  • Themes Offered: Standard decor ranges from traditional royal aesthetics to contemporary luxury lighting themes.
  • Execution Options: They operate flexibly by executing layouts through both in-house decorating assets and external decorators depending on customer preference. 
Cities Covered 
  • Primary Hub: Alwar
  • Regional Extension: Bhiwadi, Neemrana, Pijari, and Jaipur. 
Guest & Hospitality Management 
  • Hospitality Logistics: Complete coordination of guest arrivals, venue direction mapping, and on-site hospitality desk management.
  • Coordination Infrastructure: Managing on-the-move exhibition-style travel assets and local accommodation layouts for arriving guests. 
Entertainment Services 
  • Artist & Stage Bookings: Sourcing local and corporate entertainment performers.
  • Ceremony Entries: Creative design setups for the Bride & Groom entry sequences along with synchronized Ladies Sangeet audio-visual support. 
Address 
  • Primary Corporate Office: D-07, 7th Floor, Capital Galleria Mall, Manu Marg, Kabir Colony, Alwar, Rajasthan - 301001.
  • Alternative Branch Contact Point: G-3, Arjuna 16, Apna Ghar Shalimar Extension, Piraka Nagar, Alwar, Rajasthan - 301001.
